title: CraftSense
description: A Minecraft mod that suggests crafting recipes based on what you’ve crafted before, letting you quickly craft items with one click or a keybind.
body:
# CraftSense

**CraftSense** is a Minecraft mod that makes crafting faster and more convenient. It looks at the items in your inventory and suggests recipes based on what you’ve crafted before. You can instantly craft suggested items by clicking on the output slot or using a customizable keybind (`Z` by default). The mod can also be toggled on or off with a separate keybind (`K` by default).

The mod also includes several additional features - keep reading to learn more!

![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/604e13c0bbb215b6cdf1284a1d7e748c3d4abc37_0.webp)

**Requires Fabric API. Also compatible with Forge and NeoForge, using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), requires [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api).**

![CraftSense Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b70322cf87470720fc685f3354b4e37c6533eb4a_0.webp)

CraftSense remembers the last item you crafted and automatically suggests it if you have the materials. Ghost items appear in the crafting grid to guide you, and it works with recipes from other mods. You can also check basic stats about your crafting habits by pressing `J`.

**Official Downloads**:
- CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/craftsense
- GitHub: https://github.com/dooji2/craftsense
- Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/craftsense
